corrections.location: Esth A 12, first line of body
corrections.note: No comma after καρδίᾳ in the printed text.
Printed form is ἠκρόασεν, not ἠκρόασεν? Wait transcript already matches; no correction needed.
Body was altered to apparatus-like reading; printed text reads εἰς τὴν πόλιν.
Extraneous closing parenthesis after ℵc.a; separator is a vertical bar.
Apparatus has -ρρας, not -ρρας with extra rho.
No space between ℵ* and c.b in the printed siglum grouping.
Manuscript siglum is ℵ, not Greek kappa.

corrections.current:
απηχθησαν εξηχθησαν
ℵ* c.b (απηχθ. ℵc.a) A
corrections.note: No space between ℵ* and c.b in the printed siglum grouping.

corrections.current: Αμαδαθου A | λαον a sup ras Bᵃ
corrections.correct: Αμαδαθου A | λαον α sup ras Bᵃ
corrections.note: This is Greek alpha α, not Latin a.

corrections.current: και τοις αρχουσιν] και τοις α sup ras Aᵃ?
corrections.correct: και τοις αρχουσιν] και τοις α sup ras Aᵃ? |
corrections.note: Separator bar before next reading is missing.
Superscript correction mark appears as κᵃ, not plain κ.

corrections.current: πολιν] + απο μεγαλου ν εως μικρου ποτου ℵc.a mg inf
corrections.correct: πολιν] + απο μεγαλου ως εως μικρου ποτου ℵc.a mg inf
corrections.note: Printed addition reads ἀπὸ μεγάλου ἕως μικροῦ ποτοῦ; transcript has stray nu in place of ως.

uncertain.note: Accenting around ἠκρόασεν/ἤκουσεν in body is clear enough and transcript seems correct; no change made.
Superscript after κ in '(superscr κ?)' is small; may be read as κᵃ? but not fully certain.

notes: Running head matches. Body mostly correct, but at 1:5 the transcript imported apparatus reading 'ἐν τῇ πόλει' instead of printed body 'εἰς τὴν πόλιν'. Apparatus contains several minor siglum/punctuation issues. One drafted accent correction was not applied; body text there appears correct.
